response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r2c4's SoC (0.47) falls below our minimum sharing threshold (0.55), and our belief indicates all neighbors are in deficit—sharing would compromise our own recovery target of 60% SoC.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.47 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: All geographic neighbors are in energy deficit; r3c4 must prioritize charging while minimizing outbound sharing until SoC recovers above 60%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
